public_reputation: Lifted sigil formulae from unsafe private vaults and resold them as corrected safety copies.
appearance: Veyla Inkhand usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their spellthief status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a spellthief still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of spellthief in and around Faralin, Mimolot, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Faralin, Mimolot workable through the obligations of spellthief while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Mimolot.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Faralin, Mimolot, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of spellthief visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Veyla Inkhand can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Veyla Inkhand can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Veyla Inkhand needs help with a problem in Faralin, Mimolot that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Spellthief, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Mimolot.
what_they_refuse: Veyla Inkhand refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
